text:
1. Calculate the time difference: Asia/Kolkata is UTC + 5:30 and US/Hawaii is UTC - 10:00, so the time difference is 5:30 - (-10:00) = 15:30.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 02:00 + 15:30 = 17:30.
3. Since the time addition doesn't cross a day boundary, the date remains December 10, 1054.
FINAL_ANSWER: 17:30
